title: Raccoon Removal in Tremont, Bronx | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Tremont, Bronx. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely and humanely. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Tremont, taking advantage of the neighborhood's mix of residential buildings and access to food sources along major corridors like East Tremont Avenue. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Tremont homes and businesses from property damage, noise disturbances, and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tremont residents for years with fast, reliable raccoon removal services tailored to the Bronx's unique urban wildlife challenges. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, complete exclusion services, and provide full cleanup and damage repair to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Tremont's pre-war apartment buildings, multi-family homes, and proximity to parks like Crotona Park create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in attics, chimneys, and around garbage storage areas. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and older building stock near Webster Avenue and Arthur Avenue often provide raccoons with easy access points that require professional sealing and exclusion work.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Tremont, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Tremont typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the infestation (attic, chimney, crawlspace), extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Tremont due to the availability of food sources from residential areas, proximity to parks like Crotona Park, and the abundance of older buildings with accessible entry points. Raccoons are attracted to unsecured garbage, pet food, and shelter opportunities in attics and chimneys.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State and NYC regulations for humane wildlife removal. We use live trapping methods and relocate raccoons according to legal guidelines. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical wildlife control practices that prioritize animal welfare while protecting your property.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Tremont homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Tremont properties, including torn insulation, damaged ductwork, chewed electrical wiring, destroyed roof vents, and contamination from feces and urine. They often create large entry holes in roofs, soffits, and chimneys. Raccoons also carry diseases like rabies and raccoon roundworm, making professional removal essential for your family's safety.
